languages.text: "Я знала, что вы захотите доказать свою доблесть, выйдя против Погонщицы лишь со свитой! Отважно, рискованно... Как и должно, по нашим легендам, поступать Вольным Торговцам".
"I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."
languages.original_text: "Я знала, что вы захотите доказать свою доблесть, выйдя против Погонщицы лишь со свитой! Отважно, рискованно... Как и должно, по нашим легендам, поступать Вольным Торговцам".

traits.locale_text: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."
"I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."
"So this is your political manoeuvre, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."
"I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."
"I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

languages.text: 「なるほど、これが貴方の政治的策略ですか、貴方様？大胆で危険な... 悪名高いトレーダーがすべきことですね」
languages.original_text: "So this is your political manoeuvre, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど、これが貴方の政治的策略ですか、貴方（卿|女卿）様？大胆で危険な... 悪名高いトレーダーがすべきことですね。」

languages.text: "Çoban ile yanınızda sadece maiyetiniz varken yüzleşerek cesaretinizi kanıtlamak isteyeceğinizi biliyordum! Cesur, riskli... Tıpkı efsanelerde Hür Tacirler hakkında söylendiği gibi."
languages.original_text: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

traits.locale_text: "Çoban ile yanınızda sadece maiyetiniz varken yüzleşerek cesaretinizi kanıtlamak isteyeceğinizi biliyordum! Cesur, riskli... Tıpkı efsanelerde Hür Tacirler hakkında söylendiği gibi."

languages.text: «¡Sabía que querría enfrentarse al Pastor con solo su séquito! Una acción audaz y arriesgada... como las que las leyendas atribuyen a los Comerciantes Independientes».
languages.original_text: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

traits.locale_text: «¡Sabía que querría enfrentarse al Pastor con solo su séquito! Una acción audaz y arriesgada... como las que las leyendas atribuyen a los Comerciantes Independientes».

languages.text: “我就知道您会只带着随从去迎战拒生花，以此证明自己的胆色！够大胆，够冒险……完全就是传说中行商浪人的做派。”
languages.original_text: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

traits.locale_text: “我就知道您会只带着随从去迎战拒生花，以此证明自己的胆色！够大胆，够冒险……完全就是传说中行商浪人的做派。”

languages.text: « Je savais que vous chercheriez à prouver votre valeur en affrontant le Chasseur uniquement {mf|accompagné|accompagnée} de votre entourage ! Un plan audacieux et risqué... digne des libres-marchands qu'évoquent les légendes. »
languages.original_text: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

traits.locale_text: « Je savais que vous chercheriez à prouver votre valeur en affrontant le Chasseur uniquement {mf|accompagné|accompagnée} de votre entourage ! Un plan audacieux et risqué... digne des libres-marchands qu'évoquent les légendes. »

languages.text: "Ich wusste, Ihr würdet darauf bestehen, Euch dem Treiber allein mit Eurem Gefolge zu stellen, um Euren Mut zu beweisen. Mutig, riskant ... Genau wie Freihändler der Legende nach handeln sollten."
languages.original_text: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."

traits.locale_text: "Ich wusste, Ihr würdet darauf bestehen, Euch dem Treiber allein mit Eurem Gefolge zu stellen, um Euren Mut zu beweisen. Mutig, riskant ... Genau wie Freihändler der Legende nach handeln sollten."
